subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath manifested Himself unto all created things through His Name that is sanctified above all names and attributes, and Who hath summoned all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی تجلی علی الکائنات باسمه المقدس عن الاسماء و الصفات و دعا الکل
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @power of the Manifestation of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transcendence; unknowability of God
